EVD-001-001.rationale: Keep the full catalog on the server and send only current page/dialog data to clients.

EVD-001-002.claim: Use native dialog for viewport-centered modals and mobile focus isolation.
EVD-001-002.rationale: Use native dialog for viewport-centered modals and mobile focus isolation.

EVD-001-003.claim: Preserve native currency, source, model, provider, and Quality evidence without translation or FX conversion.
EVD-001-003.rationale: Preserve native currency, source, model, provider, and Quality evidence without translation or FX conversion.

EVD-002-001.claim: Stop at the workflow pre-check because the command includes --skip-harvest.
EVD-002-001.rationale: Stop at the workflow pre-check because the command includes --skip-harvest.
